property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.9.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users\faizd\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\faizd\bin;C:\Users\faizd\Downloads\eclipse-java-2025-09-R-win32-x86_64\eclipse\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.8.v20250724-1412\jre\bin\server;C:\Users\faizd\Downloads\eclipse-java-2025-09-R-win32-x86_64\eclipse\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.8.v20250724-1412\jre\bin;%PATH%;%JAVA_HOME%\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\faizd\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\faizd\apache-maven-3.9.11;C:\Users\faizd\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Users\faizd\Downloads\eclipse-java-2025-09-R-win32-x86_64\eclipse;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.

testcase.name: verifyRegistration[Faiz, Dafedar, faiz12345@gmail.com, Test@123, Test@123, PASS](1)
testcase.system-err: May 31, 2026 11:04:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 May 31, 2026 11:04:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.54. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.31.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
